Building production-grade platforms for payment and transaction processing using CNCF technologies in international environments. Sharing practical experience through internal and customer workshops on Kubernetes and system architecture.

person.name: Nomin-Erdene Tserenbat

person.name: Wai Lin Oo

Adept at embedding security into CI/CD automation pipelines and running production-grade Kubernetes environments.
